description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-tabs: tabbed content organizer with horizontal/vertical orientations. Content organization pattern used on every healthcare site. Manual and automatic activation modes.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Horizontal and vertical orientations
- [ ] Manual and automatic activation modes
- [ ] Keyboard: arrow keys, Home, End
- [ ] CSS parts: tablist, tab, panel
- [ ] Slots: default (tab panels)
- [ ] Events: hx-tab-change
- [ ] ARIA: role=tablist/tab/tabpanel, aria-selected, aria-controls
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** large
title: Implement hx-tabs component

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 8**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/hx-tab-panel.styles.ts`:
- Around line 17-29: The .panel and .panel:focus-visible rules in
hx-tab-panel.styles.ts contain hardcoded fallback literals (e.g., 1rem, 1.5,
`#343a40`, 2px, 0.125rem); remove those literal fallbacks and make the
declarations fully token-driven by using only CSS custom property tokens (e.g.,
change var(--hx-tabs-panel-padding, 1rem) to var(--hx-tabs-panel-padding) or
var(--hx-tabs-panel-padding, var(--hx-space-4)) but drop any raw numeric/string
literals, similarly replace var(--hx-tabs-panel-color, `#343a40`) with
var(--hx-tabs-panel-color) or var(--hx-tabs-panel-color,
var(--hx-color-neutral-700)), remove numeric fallbacks from
font-size/line-height, and replace outline width and border-radius fallbacks
with their token counterparts (var(--hx-focus-ring-width),
var(--hx-border-radius-sm)); update the .panel and .panel:focus-visible rules
accordingly so no raw literals remain.

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/hx-tab-panel.ts`:
- Around line 22-42: HelixTabPanel is using setAttribute for role/tabindex;
instead attach ElementInternals and wire semantics through it: add a private
internals: ElementInternals field, assign it via this.attachInternals() (e.g.,
in the constructor), and replace the setAttribute('role','tabpanel') with
setting the role/ARIA on this.internals (use the internals API to set role/ARIA
state for the tabpanel); keep tabindex handling consistent with internals-based
semantics rather than direct DOM role attribute updates in connectedCallback.

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/hx-tab.styles.ts`:
- Around line 20-38: Several CSS custom-property fallbacks in hx-tab.styles.ts
still use hardcoded literals (e.g., 0.5rem, 1rem, 2px,
